actionUnits.condition: MonoBehaviour_0 with m_Script guid f7de224e5fee443418417f9f2bfa2998 (type:3) corresponds to class Scoremanager attached to GameObject 'ScoreManager'. Scene config: winAmount=2; StarValue overridden to 1 in PrefabInstance; ScoreText/AmountUI/Timer are wired via Prefab modifications; winlosescript ref fileID=93502226. Scoremanager.changescore(int) triggers winlosescript.Winlevel() when score == winAmount, but changescore requires an int parameter and there is no Collider/EventTrigger on this object. To validate the win path despite lack of a public parameterless API, directly invoke WinLose.Winlevel() on the referenced component to simulate the condition of having collected enough stars.
